# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Convert a [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/LaunchCodeRequirement] to an [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/OnDiskCodeRequirement] if possible.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ launchRequirement: LaunchCodeRequirement) throws
```

## Discussion

Conversion will fail if the [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/LaunchCodeRequirement] contains a constraint that cannot be converted to [doc://com.apple.LightweightCodeRequirements/documentation/LightweightCodeRequirements/OnDiskConstraint].
